overview.description: The STMicroelectronics NV ADRhedged (STHH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides exposure to STMicroelectronics ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of STMicroelectronics, in its local market, to US investors. STHH was launched on Mar 13, 2025 and is issued by ADRhedged.
